description:
Dependent is the compiled form of a KindDefinition.dependents entry: each
 hook source is bundled, and the params JSON Schema is embedded inline so
 rendering does not need access to the original kind directory.

^(paramsSchema)$.description: Inlined contents of the params JSON Schema (raw JSON text).

hooks.description: Compiled, bundled dependent hooks in declaration order.

items.description:
Hook is a single hook bundled and minified from its TS/JS source, with
 all of its imports resolved and inlined.

content.description: Minified JavaScript bundle, ES module format.

name.description: Relative path from the kind directory (e.g. "hooks/hello-world.ts").

items.title: Hook

kind.description:
The consumer kind that may depend on this resource (matches
 DependentDefinition.kind).

params_schema.description: Inlined contents of the params JSON Schema (raw JSON text).

title: Dependent
